'''tayama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:uxorilocality|uxorilocality]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-y-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:uxorilocality|uxorilocality]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tayama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæyæmæth|tæyæmæth]] || [[word:tæyæmæj|tæyæmæj]] || [[word:tæyæmæsh|tæyæmæsh]] || [[word:tæyæmæ|tæyæmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tayayamath|tayayamath]] || [[word:tayayamaj|tayayamaj]] || [[word:tayayamash|tayayamash]] || [[word:tayayama|tayayama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tayamath|tayamath]] || [[word:tayamaj|tayamaj]] || [[word:tayamash|tayamash]] || [[word:tayama|tayama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tayafmath|tayafmath]] || [[word:tayafmaj|tayafmaj]] || [[word:tayafmash|tayafmash]] || [[word:tayafmaf|tayafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tayamatha|tayamatha]] || [[word:tayamaja|tayamaja]] || [[word:tayamasha|tayamasha]] || [[word:tayamaka|tayamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tayamath|tayamath]] || [[word:tayamaj|tayamaj]] || [[word:tayamash|tayamash]] || [[word:tayama|tayama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tayamathal|tayamathal]] || [[word:tayamajal|tayamajal]] || [[word:tayamashal|tayamashal]] || [[word:tayamakal|tayamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tayamathatha|tayamathatha]] || [[word:tayamajaja|tayamajaja]] || [[word:tayamashasha|tayamashasha]] || [[word:tayamaka|tayamaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tayamathan|tayamathan]] || [[word:tayamajan|tayamajan]] || [[word:tayamashan|tayamashan]] || [[word:tayamakan|tayamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tayamathaoro|tayamathaoro]] || [[word:tayamajaoro|tayamajaoro]] || [[word:tayamashaoro|tayamashaoro]] || [[word:tayamakaoro|tayamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
